title: deschampsia eminens var. fulva
intro: Deschampsia eminens var. fulva, also known as golden hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Deschampsia eminens var. fulva include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to limited research on its effects in humans.
